message: Android preview 0.1.42 prevents blank feature-map screens on older Xiaomi-era WebViews. It adds an older-viewport fallback, verifies that feature cards have actually rendered, shows a loading state, and falls back to a native feature index when WebView loading or rendering fails. Retry recovery, Redmi WebView 87 rendering, Android 36 renderer failure, and the existing export and backup protections passed verification.
